description: Pine Labs is a fintech company that provides payment and credit infrastructure for businesses, including online payment gateway services, POS products, payouts, subscriptions, and related financial workflows. Its online payments product offers APIs and tools for merchants to accept and manage digital payments.
summary: pinelabs.com exposes Pine Labs Online Payments developer surfaces including a REST API, an MCP server, and a CLI; the REST API uses bearer tokens minted from client credentials, while public docs did not reveal concrete CLI or MCP connection/auth mechanics.

surfaces.name: Pine Labs Online Payments REST API
